articles.title: MN - Serafini explains: "The ownership thinks in a certain way. The administrative part must not interfere in the sporting part"

articles.title: Pellegatti analyses: “Lack of effectiveness in the last pass, Maignan almost never worried”

articles.title: Serie A, matchday 33 ends with Lecce-Fiorentina 1-1: the updated standings
